retrieved_result: How much does Universal Joint (U-joint) Replacement cost? How much does Universal Joint (U-joint) Replacement cost? It depends on the type of car you drive and the auto repair shop you go to. Our mechanics are mobile, which means they don't have the overhead that repair shops have. They provide you convenience by coming to your home or office. Cars Estimat
